'''âr-t-r-h''' ('''karatrehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cense|cense]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-t-r-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cense|cense]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-t-r-h
|-
! Lemma
| karatrehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiratrehoko|thiratrehoko]] || [[word:jiratrehoko|jiratrehoko]] || [[word:shiratrehoko|shiratrehoko]] || [[word:kiratrehoko|kiratrehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuratrehoko|thuthuratrehoko]] || [[word:jujuratrehoko|jujuratrehoko]] || [[word:shushuratrehoko|shushuratrehoko]] || [[word:kukuratrehoko|kukuratrehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuratrehoko|thuratrehoko]] || [[word:juratrehoko|juratrehoko]] || [[word:shuratrehoko|shuratrehoko]] || [[word:kuratrehoko|kuratrehoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoratrehoko|thothoratrehoko]] || [[word:jojoratrehoko|jojoratrehoko]] || [[word:shoshoratrehoko|shoshoratrehoko]] || [[word:kokoratrehoko|kokoratrehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoratrehoko|thoratrehoko]] || [[word:joratrehoko|joratrehoko]] || [[word:shoratrehoko|shoratrehoko]] || [[word:koratrehoko|koratrehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoratrehoko|thoratrehoko]] || [[word:joratrehoko|joratrehoko]] || [[word:shoratrehoko|shoratrehoko]] || [[word:koratrehoko|koratrehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠratrehoko|thĂŠratrehoko]] || [[word:jĂŠratrehoko|jĂŠratrehoko]] || [[word:shĂŠratrehoko|shĂŠratrehoko]] || [[word:kĂŠratrehoko|kĂŠratrehoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharatrehoko|tharatrehoko]] || [[word:jaratrehoko|jaratrehoko]] || [[word:sharatrehoko|sharatrehoko]] || [[word:karatrehoko|karatrehoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
